internships_evaluated.evidence: - Assisted in drafting of Draft Red Herring Prospectus (DRHP) for a mainboard IPO of a mid-cap manufacturing company, specifically the risk factors section and litigation disclosures chapter under Schedule VI of ICDR Regulations, 2018 - Reviewed SEBI observation letter and prepared initial response matrix flagging compliance gaps - Prepared LODR compliance checklist for the issuer covering board composition, audit committee requirements, and related party transaction disclosures required post-listing - Assisted in reviewing underwriting agreement and coordinating with merchant banker on book building timeline
internships_evaluated.reasoning: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas is a Tier 1 firm. The work described is highly specific, involving drafting, reviewing regulatory responses, preparing compliance checklists, and reviewing agreements, demonstrating deep engagement.

internships_evaluated.evidence: - Assisted in QIP transaction for a listed NBFC - drafted sections of the placement document and reviewed institutional investor agreements - Conducted due diligence on material contracts including loan agreements and key customer contracts for IPO readiness assessment - Researched FEMA provisions applicable to FPI participation in the QIP and prepared a regulatory note on applicable RBI approvals - Assisted in preferential allotment matter - drafted board and shareholder resolutions and reviewed ICDR compliance checklist
internships_evaluated.reasoning: AZB & Partners is a Tier 1 firm. The work includes drafting placement documents, conducting due diligence, researching complex regulatory provisions (FEMA, FPI), and drafting resolutions, indicating deep and substantive involvement.

internships_evaluated.evidence: - Assisted in review of DRHP filings submitted by merchant bankers - identified disclosure gaps against ICDR Regulations requirements - Prepared internal notes on recent amendments to SEBI LODR Regulations and their impact on listed company disclosure obligations - Attended hearings related to SEBI enforcement proceedings under the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992
internships_evaluated.reasoning: SEBI is a Tier 1 regulator, considered a strong signal for Capital Markets interest. The work involves reviewing regulatory filings, identifying disclosure gaps, preparing notes on regulatory amendments, and attending enforcement hearings, demonstrating deep insight into regulatory processes.

criterion_2_2.overall_reasoning: The candidate has completed three internships with Tier 1 organizations (Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas, AZB & Partners, and SEBI). summary: This candidate presents an exceptionally strong profile for a Capital Markets role. Their academic record from a Tier 1 NLU is outstanding, complemented by a Dean's Merit Scholarship and a high class rank. The internships with top-tier firms and the regulator (SEBI) demonstrate extensive practical experience and deep technical knowledge in capital markets, including specific tasks related to IPOs, QIPs, DRHP drafting, and regulatory compliance. Furthermore, their success in corporate/securities law moots and relevant publications highlight strong analytical and research capabilities, making them a highly competitive candidate.
